review_text: Delivery was late and I received no update from customer service.
Great product and fast delivery. Very happy with the service.
The refund process was confusing and nobody replied to my email.
The app is okay but checkout has too many steps.
Customer support was rude and unhelpful.
Good quality product but the delivery tracking could be clearer.
I was charged twice and it took too long to get my money back.
Excellent customer service and easy ordering process.
The website was confusing and I could not find my order status.
Long delays, poor communication, and no apology.
